items.title: Report: New Zelda Ocarina of Time remake set for release on Switch 2 this year, new Star Fox game, more
items.summary:
There have been some notable releases for Switch 2 thus far, but nothing overly remarkable at this point. We have had some notable first-party releases with the new Mario Tennis game and the Super Mario Bros. Wonder expansion, not to mention the surprisingly well-received Pokémon Pokopia. But Nintendo is going to need some heavy hitters to keep the hype rolling this year – will we finally get a new 3D Mario experience? Doesn’t sound like it at this point, but rumor has it a massive Zelda remake is inbound alongside a new Star Fox game and much sooner than later at that.

items.title: Save $314 on Dyson’s highly advanced Gen5detect cordless vacuum that adapts to floor needs at $735
items.summary:
As part of the final day of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, you can bring home Dyson’s highly-advanced Gen5detect Cordless Vacuum down at $734.99 shipped. This model would run you $1,049 were it at full price, but it’s dropping down to the second-best rate we have tracked in four months here while the savings last, beaten out by a short-term lightning sale that took things $35 lower last week. While we have seen the price go lower in 2025, those rates haven’t been seen since Black Friday, with the 30% markdown here still giving you a solid $314 cut from the tag. If you’re looking for a cheaper alternative, you can find a number of Dyson’s other vacuums, air purifiers, and fans getting up to 39% savings starting from $230 here.

As part of the Amazon Big Spring Sale, you can pick up the popular Bissell Little Green Mini Portable Deep Cleaner for $74.99 shipped. Normally going for $100 at full price, this handy compact cleaner has spent a considerable amount of time since February staying at $89, with the savings now even better and returning back to Christmas sale pricing. The deal here is a 25% markdown that slashes $25 from the tag, landing it at the second-best price we have tracked, only beaten out by the one-time low last seen during July’s Prime Day event. You can head below to learn why its a top pick from us here at 9to5Toys, or shop Bissell’s other cleaner deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Here are all the Amazon Big Spring Sale PC and gaming deals: Monitors, storage devices, keyboards, more
items.summary:
Amazon’s Big Spring Sale has been going strong for the past few days, and it’s officially the last day of the sale today. That means it’s your final chance to score some standout gaming and PC deals before the event wraps. We’re rounding up a broad selection of offers across battlestation upgrades, storage gear, and everyday accessories, with notable price drops still live as the clock winds down. While not every discount is marking a record low price, many of these deals remain particularly noteworthy given how hardware prices have been trending lately. As always, inventory can shift quickly on the last day of a major sale event, so if something’s been sitting on your wishlist, now’s the time to make your move.

The brand’s Ace Pro 2 8K action camera is seeing a notable price drop right now, with the dual battery bundle going for $329 shipped. That’s a notable drop from its usual $419 price and marks the return of the lowest price it hit towards the end of last year.
